title: Crystal PvP Modpack
description: Welcome to Crystal PvP Modpack! This modpack is made to easily start playing cpvp right away. Optimizations, PvP Mods and more are pre-installed so all you have to do is log into a server.
body:
**Welcome to Crystal PvP Modpack! This was made mainly for crystal pvpers but you can use in any pvp types or even survival. Do you ever want to play cpvp but you have low fps or no pvp mods? This modpack is perfect for you!**

## Installation Instructions
There's 2 installtion processes. 
### First Process: The Modrinth App
1. Open the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app)
2. Go to Discover Content & Search the modpack name
3. Now simply click Install or click on it and specify version

### Second Process: Browser install
1. Find the modrinth modpack you want and click install / version
2. With the mrpack file, you want to download the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app)
3. Click on the + (left side of the app)
4. Select the From File button and put the .mrpack file in there.

## 🛠️ Features
⚙️ Performance Tweaks – Optimized using mods like Vulkan, Lithium, and others to ensure smooth gameplay even on lower-end systems.

🧩 Mod Variety – A wide selection of quality-of-life improvements, visual enhancements, and fun gameplay additions.

🏹 Balanced Progression – Mods are integrated with a focus on game balance, ensuring a fair and enjoyable challenge.

🎮 Multiplayer Ready – Built with compatibility and performance in mind for both solo and server play.

🧭 Actively Maintained – Regular updates and community-driven tweaks keep things fresh and stable.

## 🔧 Modpack Information
⛏️ Minecraft version: [1.21.1]

🛠️ Loader: [Fabric]

💻 Java Version: [Java 21]

## 🧾 Permissions & Licensing
✅ This pack complies with Modrinth's content rules.
